title: Listing Pipeline v1 — Views-equivalent surface for entity listings

charter_dependencies.note: Cache package tag-aware operations + context registry.

external_dependencies.note: Provides TranslatableInterface + SaveContext::langcode for the langcode-aware filter/tag deliverables (M-006 C-002 carved this surface for this mission). Shipped 2026-05-13.

downstream_unblocks.note: Clears the second prerequisite from M-004's PARTIALLY UNBLOCKED stamp. M-004 becomes fully plannable when this mission ships — but §3 FRs and §7 WP decomposition still need revalidation against the actual M-006 + M-007 substrates before M-004 planning begins.

validation_entity_type: fixture listing in packages/listing/tests/Fixtures/ (single end-to-end demo against InMemoryEntityStorage + MemoryBackend cache)
notes: Largest single feature in the post-charter framework roadmap per ADR 015 §Consequences (Views-equivalent listings = 60-80% of CMS pages). Owns the cache tag/context architecture alongside the listing surface itself — ADR 015's 'right forcing function' for committing the framework to tags + contexts. Brainstormed 2026-05-14: cache architecture owned by this mission (no cache-tags-v1 sibling); access policies applied row-by-row post-query with short-pages-accepted semantics; offset+limit pagination only (cursor deferred to v1.x); langcode-aware filters + langcode-in-cache-tags ship in this mission per M-006 C-002. Authored 2026-05-15 after M-006 close-out (#1485 / a7840a36a on 2026-05-14).
